channel.title: GitHub EJS Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of EJS in GitHub

item.title: danstepanov/create-expo-stack
item.description: CLI tool to initialize a React Native application with Expo. Provides options to include Typescript, file-based routing via Expo Router, configuration based routing via pure React Navigation, styling via Nativewind, Restyle, Unistyles, StyleSheets, or Tamagui, and/or backend as a service such as Firebase and Supabase.

item.title: betagouv/template-design-system-de-l-etat
item.description: Démo du Design System de l'État (ressource non officielle)

item.title: keikaavousi/fake-store-api
item.description: FakeStoreAPI is a free online REST API that provides you fake e-commerce JSON data
